findings.description: The document states 'Security considerations are documented in Section 6' but there is no Section 6 in this document.
findings.evidence: "Security considerations are documented in Section 6." — Section 6 does not exist in the document.
findings.suggestion: Either add a Section 6 covering security, or remove the dangling reference.

findings.description: The retry policy is referenced as 'the standard retry policy' but is never defined anywhere in the document.
findings.evidence: "Transformation applies the standard retry policy on transient failures." — no policy definition exists.
findings.suggestion: Define the retry policy (number of attempts, backoff strategy) or reference the document where it is defined.

findings.description: Stage 2 defers to an undefined 'standard retry policy'; Stage 3 specifies '3 retry attempts'. The two retry behaviors are described inconsistently.
findings.evidence: Stage 2: "applies the standard retry policy on transient failures" vs Stage 3: "requeued for up to 3 retry attempts."
findings.suggestion: Standardize retry policy documentation — define it globally and reference it, or specify it per-stage.

findings.description: A final-stage architecture brief for a production pipeline should include a Security section. None exists.
findings.evidence: Document sections: Overview, Architecture Components, Performance Characteristics, Operational Notes, Conclusions. No security section present despite being referenced as 'Section 6'.
findings.suggestion: Add a Section covering security — authentication details, authorization model, encryption in transit and at rest.
